notes: Umbrella0.4 services use Python standard library modules only; there are no runtime pip dependencies.

Supported range is >=3.9: the contract suite is green on 3.9.6 and CI exercises 3.9 and 3.12. Development also happens on newer interpreters (3.14); no upper bound is enforced because none is evidenced.
install.sh enforces python.minimum from this file with a real version check.
The installer no longer creates a virtual environment: nothing consumed it at runtime, so it was removed rather than kept as dead weight.
